name: UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP
notes:
Detects when there are multiple account logins from the same source IP address.
Note: Before enabling this rule, make sure the rule "UBA : Populate Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP" is enabled and the "UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP" reference set has data.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful
when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In From Single IP - IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : VPN Login Successful
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In From Single IP - IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Multiple VPN Accounts Logged In from Single IP
